honest_caveats: RTAMT formula is a qualitative STL analogue of BAUD-v1, not the exact ADR predicate (STL cannot natively count K-of-M occurrences).
Ghost's verifier has full knowledge of the Ghost message schema; RTAMT receives the signals pre-extracted by 12 lines of glue code.
Wall-clock times measure the verification step only, not the signal-extraction step that RTAMT requires.
